title: jasminum cordatum
intro: Jasminum cordatum, also known as star jasmine, is a climbing plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, headache, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jasminum cordatum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to make medicinal remedies or added to skincare products for its therapeutic benefits.
